entries.source: "Explain recursion in JavaScript"
entries.value: "Ipaliwanag ang recursion sa JavaScript"

entries.source: "Help debug this error"
entries.value: "Tumulong mag-debug ito error"

entries.source: "Teach me Python loops"
entries.value: "Turuan mo ako ng Python mga loop"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Code Tutor on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Isang praktikal gabay sa gamit ang Code Tutor sa inspir para sa stem pag-aaral, kasama ang mga prompt, mga loop sa pag-aaral, at mas ligtas AI mga gawi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Isang mas malakas loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI na tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang small una hakbang rather kaysa isang huling sagot.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI suriin iyong pangangatwiran, hindi lang resulta.

entries.source: Beginner and intermediate programmers who need explanations, debugging help, or project coaching.
entries.value: Mga baguhan at intermediate na programmer na nangangailangan ng paliwanag, tulong sa pag-debug, o coaching sa proyekto.

entries.source: Code Tutor
entries.value: Code Tutor

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Understand code, debug errors, learn concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Code Tutor Para sa Pag-aaral Programming Ng Pagbuo ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Understand code, debug mga error, Matutunan ang mga konsepto, at Bumuo ng small projects hakbang hakbang.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building: practical guide
entries.value: Code Tutor Para sa Pag-aaral Programming Ng Pagbuo: praktikal gabay

entries.source: Explain the bug.
entries.value: Ipaliwanag ang bug.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish ng pagsusulat ang ideya likod mula sa memory.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Mga prompt sa subukan

entries.source: Start the live mode at Code Tutor. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Project Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Magsimula ang live mode at Code Tutor. Kung ikaw gusto isang neighboring pag-aaral format, subukan Proyekto Coach. Para sa isang mas malawak view ng ang platform, Basahin ano isang AI katuwang sa pag-aaral dapat gawin para sa lahat.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Sabihin sa mode kung ano ang sinusubukan mong matutunan o mabuo.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Na difference shows up sa ang flow. Instead ng isa giant response, ang pinakamahusay mga session lumipat sa pamamagitan ng isang loop: set isang layunin, subukan something, get feedback, repair ang mahina spot, at pumili ang susunod action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Na pokus matters. Isang general chatbot Maaari bang sagot almost anything, pero isang pag-aaral mode gives ang conversation isang shape. Ito nudges ikaw toward ang kind ng thinking, pagsasanay, feedback, o exploration na tumutulong ang ideya stick.

entries.source: The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: Tatanungin ka ng tutor kung ano ang inaasahan mong gawin ng code, pagkatapos ay gagamit ng maliliit na halimbawa at pagsusulit para mas madaling maintindihan ang behavior nito.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ito ay ang same gawi behind studying kasama ang AI nang walang cheating yourself: keep ang mag-aaral aktibo. AI ay pinaka kapaki-pakinabang kapag ito gives ikaw feedback sa iyong thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ito mode ay especially kapaki-pakinabang para sa mga mag-aaral sino gusto sa:

entries.source: Try a small fix.
entries.value: Subukan isang small fix.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Subukan ang hakbang sa iyong own mga salita.

entries.source: Understand the concept.
entries.value: Understand ang konsepto.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gamitin Code Tutor Kapag ikaw gusto isang session na nagsisimula quickly pero pa rin umaangkop sa ikaw. Ang una layunin ay hindi sa tunog impressive. Ang una layunin ay gumawa ang susunod hakbang feel posible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Saan nakatutulong ang mode na ito

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Saan susunod

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ikaw Maaari bang also magsimula kasama ang isang magaspang version ng iyong totoo problema. Isang magulo una prompt ay fine. Ang session Maaari bang clarify ang antas, madla, deadline, at estilo once ikaw magsimula.
